{{Quote|That ''boy'' you're seeking... and his ''droid''... held out hope of something ''better,'' Vader.|Beilert Valance|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 29">[[Star Wars (1977) 29|''Star Wars'' (1977) 29]]</ref>}}
'''''Star Wars 29: Dark Encounter''''' is the twenty-ninth issue of the [[Star Wars (1977)|''Marvel Star Wars'']] series of comic books.

==Plot summary==
[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] discovers that [[Tyler Lucian]], a Rebel deserter, knows the name of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] pilot who destroyed the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]]. The [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Beilert Valance/Legends|Beilert Valance]] is on the trail of the same man but for a different reason, he wants to prevent Vader from learning the information he seeks. The two confront each other near Lucian's hideout at [[Rubyflame Lake]], and a terrific battle occurs between the two [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborgs]]. Vader is victorious when Valance falls into the fatally corrosive lake waters allowing the dark lord to freely enter Lucian's hideout. But Lucian decides not to wait for Vader but instead jumps into Rubyflame Lake, killing himself and thwarting Vader's plans.
